title: 'My mother cried out one last time': Palestinian boy, 12, describes how Israeli forces killed his family in car
summary_full: Khaled Bani Odeh's parents and two brothers were shot dead as they drove home from a shopping trip in the occupied West Bank.
summary_public: Khaled Bani Odeh's parents and two brothers were shot dead as they drove home from a shopping trip in the occupied West Bank.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israeli forces killed his family in car
